List namespace

Source: R/list_namespace.R
list_namespace.Rd

List all objects (e.g. functions, data) in the namespace one or more R packages.

Usage

list_namespace(packages, status_filter = NULL, verbose = TRUE)

Arguments

packages

A character vector of package names.

status_filter

Filter by namespace status (e.g. "export","import"). If NULL (default), will return all namespace objects.

verbose

Print messages.

Value

A data.table.

Examples

nm_dt <- list_namespace(packages=c("data.table","pals"))
#> Querying 2 packages.
#> Gathering functions from: data.table
#> Gathering functions from: pals

On this page
